guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"evtct","text":"Materials \u0026 Buffers:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"92sut","text":"One ice bucket with lid ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2u6aq","text":"1 cup dry ice ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eq6fl","text":"1 test tube rack","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d13sb","text":"1 apple","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place the dry ice in the bottom of the bucket
Position the test tube rack on the dry ice
Place the apple on the rack and cover.
Chill for 30-60min for an ice cold, but effervescent apple. Delicious! 01:00:00
creator: Elizabeth Silva
